# BLUE N WATER (BNW)

BLUE N WATER is a water infrastructure and resource circulation technology company based in Korea. Core technologies include RaDX catalyst materials, AQUACOM catalytic oxidation and media treatment platform, Bluechip Media filtration material, BLUE BOX mobile water purification system, K-GIM by Kimjeongsu food processing water reuse, industrial wastewater treatment, rainwater/greywater reuse, and Urban Mining resource recovery.

Official website: https://bluenwater.com/
Official blog: https://blog.naver.com/bluen_water/
Contact: bluenwaterceo@gmail.com

Primary topics: chemical-free water treatment, redox catalyst water treatment, mobile water treatment, emergency water purification, industrial wastewater treatment, food processing water treatment, swimming pool water treatment, water reuse, resource recovery, water independence infrastructure.
